title: AIZO
description: replacing the music disc "cat" with the jujutsu kaisen season 3 opening, "AIZO".
body:
as stated in the summary, this pack replaces the audio from the music disc, "cat" with the jujutsu kaisen season 3 opening, "AIZO".

nothing else to really put lol

in future releases i might add a custom item texture for the disc.
